title: Playgroups in Spelthorne
description: Playgroups provide children of pre-school age a chance to socialise with other children. They usually have a range of toys and may offer other activities such as crafts, singing, storytime and snacktime.

meta.note: Some groups stop running during school holidays - we recommend checking before turning up.
